microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND eating hot foods THEN 3 min BECAUSE hotter food retains warmth longer during conversation. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND eating dessert THEN no microwave BECAUSE minimal effort is preferred and dessert is often served cold. IF watching TV AND relaxed AND eating fruits THEN 1 min BECAUSE slightly warmer fruits are more palatable without disrupting relaxation. IF eating in a hurry AND eating meats THEN 1 min BECAUSE a quicker meal prep is prioritized over temperature. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN 2 min BECAUSE a balance between warmth and efficiency is needed.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE maintaining eye contact is important. IF eating alone AND watching TV AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE clear view of the screen is necessary. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE task focus is prioritized over view. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE speed is more important than view. IF eating alone AND relaxed AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE a clear personal space is preferred.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE smoother interaction is desired. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN slow BECAUSE it allows more time for user responses. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN slow BECAUSE it complements a leisurely pace. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN fast BECAUSE efficiency is prioritized. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it balances task focus and dining speed.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND eating meats THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it increases bite acquisition success. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it requires less user effort. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND eating fruits THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it minimizes mess and distraction. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND eating desserts THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it ensures quicker acquisition. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it reduces spillage risk.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE explicit confirmation avoids errors. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it ensures accuracy despite fatigue. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN no BECAUSE minimizing interruptions is preferred. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN no BECAUSE speed takes precedence over confirmation. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it maintains task focus by preventing errors.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it allows for natural conversation. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it avoids distraction. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it minimizes disruption.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it allows for easier conversation. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it requires less user effort. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it minimizes distraction. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it reduces interruption.

robot_ready_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it ensures the cue is noticed. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it requires less attention. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN LED BECAUSE it is less disruptive. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is quicker to process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it minimizes visual distraction.

bite_initiation_feeding.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it avoids false positives. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it maintains task focus.

IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it maintains task focus.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it reduces obstruction during conversation. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it reduces unnecessary movement. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it minimizes visual obstruction. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it reduces obstruction of the workspace.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces messiness. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND eating foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND eating foods with sauces THEN dip food in sauce BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces risk of spills.

amount_to_dip.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN less BECAUSE it reduces messiness. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND eating foods with sauces THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is avoided. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND eating foods with sauces THEN more BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is avoided. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND eating foods with sauces THEN less BECAUSE it reduces risk of spills.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN 100 BECAUSE it balances interaction and autonomy. IF eating alone AND fatigued AND any food THEN 1000 BECAUSE it allows ample time for user response. IF eating while watching TV AND relaxed AND any food THEN 1000 BECAUSE it complements a leisurely pace. IF eating in a hurry AND any affective state AND any food THEN 10 BECAUSE speed is prioritized. IF eating while working on a laptop AND neutral affective state AND any food THEN 100 BECAUSE it balances task focus and dining autonomy.

microwave_time.rationale: In a social setting with a neutral affective state and eating hot foods, the preference is for 3 min to retain warmth longer during conversation.

occlusion_relevance.rationale: In a social setting, minimizing left occlusion is important to maintain eye contact with the person on the left.

outside_mouth_distance.rationale: Medium distance allows for easier conversation in a social setting.

retract_between_bites.rationale: Retracting between bites reduces obstruction during conversation.

robot_bite_available_cue.rationale: In a social setting, using both speech and LED ensures the cue is noticed.

robot_ready_cue.rationale: In a social setting, using both speech and LED ensures the cue is noticed.

robot_speed.rationale: In a social setting, medium speed is preferred for smoother interaction.

skewering_axis.rationale: Parallel skewering is the default and suits the current food type without specific conditional preferences.

transfer_mode.rationale: In a social setting, outside mouth transfer allows for natural conversation.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.rationale: In a social setting, 100 seconds balances interaction and autonomy.

web_interface_confirmation.rationale: In a social setting, explicit confirmation avoids errors.

amount_to_dip.rationale: Dipping is not applicable, so the amount to dip is also not applicable.
